questions.label: Strategic AI Vision
questions.prompt: Our organization has a clear and compelling AI vision and roadmap in place.

questions.label: Corporate Strategy Alignment
questions.prompt: AI objectives are explicitly aligned with our primary corporate strategy.

questions.label: AI Enterprise Metrics
questions.prompt: How mature are the KPIs used to track AI investment value and business ROI?

questions.label: AI Risk Appetite
questions.prompt: What level of AI risk is leadership willing to accept for competitive gain?

questions.label: AI Decision Ownership
questions.prompt: Who holds final accountability for AI investment and deployment decisions?

questions.label: Technology Designed for Business
questions.prompt: Technology is designed with business outcomes and user experience in mind.
questions.typed_response: Many disagreements in planning, deployment, and budget

questions.label: Conflict Resolution
questions.prompt: We have effective mechanisms for resolving cross-functional AI conflicts.
questions.typed_response: Many disagreements in planning, deployment, and budget

questions.label: Utilize AI-Driven Insights
questions.prompt: Teams regularly utilize AI-driven insights in day-to-day decisions.
questions.typed_response: Many disagreements in planning, deployment, and budget

questions.label: Employee Concerns
questions.prompt: What are the primary employee concerns about AI adoption?

questions.label: Solid Governance Structure
questions.prompt: We have a solid governance structure for AI initiatives.

questions.label: Effective Risk Mitigation
questions.prompt: We have effective risk mitigation strategies for AI deployment.

questions.label: Shadow AI Confidence
questions.prompt: We have visibility and control over unsanctioned AI tool usage.

questions.label: Modern Cloud Infrastructure
questions.prompt: We have modern, scalable cloud infrastructure ready for AI workloads.

questions.label: Core Systems AI Ready
questions.prompt: Our core systems and APIs are structured and accessible for AI integration.

questions.label: ML Ops Maturity
questions.prompt: We have mature MLOps practices for model deployment and monitoring.

questions.label: Security Architecture
questions.prompt: Our security architecture is designed to support safe AI deployment.

questions.label: Data structured & clean
questions.prompt: Our core data is well-structured, clean, and accessible for AI use cases.

questions.label: Data integrated for AI
questions.prompt: Cross-functional data is formatted and available for model training.

questions.label: Data Dictionary and Ownership
questions.prompt: We have clear data dictionaries and assigned domain ownership.

questions.label: Future-State Vision
questions.prompt: What is the desired day-to-day impact of AI in two years?
questions.typed_response: Agents running day to day work with execs making decisions
